|next=Battlegrounds_Mobile_India_Pro_Series/2024{{!}}2024 }} '''Battlegrounds Mobile India Pro Series''' (abbreviated as '''BMPS''') is a BGMI professional tournament series. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Stage Host|lang=in |b1=Rohit|b1flag=in|b1name=Rohit Varghese }} {{broadcasterCard|position=Hindi Commentator |b1=AnkiiiBOT |b2=Mazy |b3=Spero |b4=RA1 }} {{box|break}} {{broadcasterCard|position=English Commentator |b1=SuperJonny |b2=Arka |b3=Saltyy }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== * '''League:''''' November 22nd - December 9th, 2023 ** 96 teams: *** Divided into 2 groups (Blue & Red). *** Each group features 6 sub-groups. ** Each sub-group play for 3 weeks. *** Each week features 3 matchdays. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams overall}} advance to ''Grand Finals''.
* '''Grand Finals:''''' December 15th - 17th, 2023 ** 16 teams. ** 18 matches. ==Prize Pool== {{TeamPrizePool|localcurrency=inr |{{Slot|localprize=40,00,000 |{{Opponent|blind esports}} }}
